establishment.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport

accreditation.notes: Programs are officially recognized and validated by the Supreme Council of Universities

vision_mission.vision: To be recognized as one of the top business education service providers in the Arab region, offering rigorous graduate programs in management alongside impactful intellectual contributions and outreach initiatives.
vision_mission.mission: To contribute to the intellectual and human capital development of future business leaders by continuously updating graduate programs that advance management and business practices in a rapidly changing world.

educational_objectives: Promote critical thinking and creative problem solving
Provide experiential learning through case studies, internships, and research
Prepare graduates for ethical and responsible leadership
Integrate sustainability and social responsibility into business education
Align curricula with emerging global business trends
institutes_and_centers: Arab Institute of Trade and Commodities Exchange (AITCE)

training_and_practice.description: Experiential learning through internships, applied research projects, executive training programs, and business consultancy services.

college_council: Vice President of AASTMT for Postgraduate Studies and Scientific Research
Dean of Graduate School of Business
Vice Dean for Training and Community Service

quality_assurance.qa_description: Continuous program review and quality assurance aligned with Supreme Council of Universities standards.

strategic_positioning.focus: Executive education, leadership development, applied research
strategic_positioning.target_students: Working professionals, executives, future business leaders
strategic_positioning.regional_role: One of the leading postgraduate business schools in the Arab region
